title: Students
description: Information about a person who is registered/enrolled in the institution as a student.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the student.

person.title: Person
person.description: A reference to link a student to the common HEDM persons entity.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Person.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Type.

cohorts.title: Cohorts
cohorts.description: Groupings of students for reporting/tracking purposes (cohorts) to which the student is associated.

items.title: Cohorts
items.description: Groupings of students for reporting/tracking purposes (cohorts) to which the student is associated.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Cohorts.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: A list of custom defined attributes or characteristics (tags) assigned to the student.

items.title: Tags
items.description: A list of custom defined attributes or characteristics (tags) assigned to the student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Tags.

residency.title: Residency
residency.description: The residency type of the student (e.g.: international, in state, out of state, etc.).

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Residency.

measures.title: Measures
measures.description: Measures (GPA, year classification) associated with the student by academic level.

level.title: Level
level.description: The academic level associated with the student.

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Level.

performanceMeasure.title: Performance Measure
performanceMeasure.description: Measurement of the student's performance by academic level. (e.g. GPA).

classification.title: Classification
classification.description: The student's classification by academic level. (E.g Freshman, Senior, ...)

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier for the Classification.
